    @allure.story("游戏社区创建删除语音房")
    @allure.title("【场景】TC-VOICE-003~004 游戏社区创建并删除语音房")
    @pytest.mark.P1
    def test_game_community_create_delete_voice_room(self, community_api):
        """游戏社区：创建语音房 → 验证创建成功 → 删除语音房 → 验证删除成功"""
        data = TEST_DATA["community_flow"]
        community = data["community"]
        voice_data = data["voice_room_game"]
        created_channel_id = None
    
        # Step 1: 创建语音房
        with allure.step("创建游戏社区语音房"):
            resp = community_api.bat_add_personal_server_topic_channel(
                channel_names=voice_data["channel_names"],
                group_id=community["game_group_id"],
                channel_type=data["channel_type"]["voice_room"],
                server_id=community["game_server_id"],
                server_type=community["game_server_type"],
            )
            result = assert_response_success(resp)
>           _assert_ret_code_100(result, "创建游戏社区语音房")
